paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05 as of July 17, representing a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 sessions. There has been one new news article in the last 24 hours.

The recent news is driven by the resignation of director Miles Everson, who cited governance concerns, and the completion of a $375 million convertibles deal. This news was reported by simplywall.st on July 17.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form on July 15 regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form on July 13 disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has also been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
